# Check what changed after RIGHT movement
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')

for i in range(35, min(42, len(ascii_lines))):
    print(f"  row {i}: {ascii_lines[i][10:30]}")

# Check agent position by segmentation
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'M' and n['pixels'] == 18:
        center_r = sum(p[0] for p in n['boundary']) / len(n['boundary'])
        center_c = sum(p[1] for p in n['boundary']) / len(n['boundary'])
        print(f"\nAgent (M, 18px): center=({center_r:.1f},{center_c:.1f}) boundary={n['boundary']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
